---
title: "Implementing FAIR and reproducible teaching"
subtitle: |
  Final report for the "Claussen-Simon-Fonds für Wissenschaft & Hochschule"
date: today
# doi: "{{< var project.doi >}}"
---

::: {.callout-note title="About this document"}
This is the final report for the project "{{< meta title >}}", supported by the [Claussen-Simon-Fonds für Wissenschaft & Hochschule](https://www.claussen-simon-stiftung.de/de/wissenschaft-hochschule/claussen-simon-fonds-wissenschaft-hochschule/).
An online version of this report is available at [{{< var project.website >}}]({{< var project.website >}}).
<!-- A PDF version of this application is archived on Zenodo at [{{< var project.doi-link >}}]({{< var project.doi-link >}}). -->
The contents of this report are available under a [{{< var project.license-long >}}]({{< var project.license-long >}}) license and were developed using {{< var links.quarto >}} and {{< var links.git >}}.
The source code of this application is available on GitHub at [{{< var project.github >}}]({{< var project.github >}}).
For questions, feedback or any other comments, please open an issue on GitHub at [{{< var project.issues >}}]({{< var project.issues >}}) or send an email to [{{< var project.email >}}]({{< var project.mailto >}}).
The application can be found at <https://lennartwittkuhn.com/fair-teaching-report/>.
:::

{{< include _project-information.md >}}
\newpage
{{< include _project-description.md >}}
{{< include _status-quo.md >}}
{{< include _target-group.md >}}
{{< include cost-justification.qmd >}}
{{< include _acknowledgements.md >}}
{{< include references.qmd >}}
